title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Mon Apr 20, 2026
summary: Four new daily event files added for April 13–14 and April 19–20. On April 13, Bad Bunny sent an emotional message to Peru fans following Lima concerts, calling Peru "key" to the DTMF World Tour. On April 14, a new Bad Bunny x Adidas slides collaboration for Summer 2026 leaked, featuring Puerto Rican cave-inspired textures. On April 19, the University of New Mexico announced a Fall 2026 course using Bad Bunny's fashion as a sociological lens on gender and race. On April 20, Bloomberg reported on bespoke parametric weather insurance behind his sold-out Colombia concerts, and NPR Throughline released an analysis exploring how Bad Bunny made Puerto Rican independence politics mainstream.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Sun Apr 19, 2026
summary: University of New Mexico to Offer Course Examining Bad Bunny's Fashion, Gender, and Politics.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Sat Apr 18, 2026
summary: Three new daily event files created for April 15–17. On April 15, Bad Bunny won Pollstar Latin Tour of the Year at the 37th Annual Pollstar Awards (Loews Hollywood Hotel, LA) for the Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour — his second consecutive Pollstar Latin Tour crown. On April 16, PriceLabs data revealed short-term rental booking surges of up to 431% in Warsaw, 340% in Düsseldorf, and 277% in Milan ahead of the European tour dates. On April 17, Pedro Pascal revealed in Fantastic Man (via Deadline) that he sent a selfie email to volunteer for the Super Bowl LX halftime show and was given mere minutes' notice to dance in the 'La Casita' segment. The timeline was updated with the Pollstar Award entry. Meta updated to reflect the Pollstar win and upcoming European tour.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Sun Apr 12, 2026
summary: Two new daily event files added for April 11–12. On April 11, Bad Bunny was spotted in the audience at Coachella 2026 Weekend 1 attending Justin Bieber's Saturday headlining set; he was also seen alongside The Weeknd, both incognito with bandanas. On April 12, Super Bowl LX collaborator Karol G made history as the first Latina to headline Coachella — a full-circle cultural moment following Bad Bunny's own landmark 2023 headlining set. The political/discography section was updated to reflect Karol G's Coachella milestone. The Spotify Monthly Listeners KPI was updated to 105.9M, normalizing from the post-Super Bowl/Grammy peak of 110.4M. Meta updated with Coachella context.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Apr 9, 2026
summary: Four new daily event files added covering April 6–9. The headline development is the global premiere of "Billions Club Live With Bad Bunny: A Concert Film" on Spotify (April 8) — a 42-minute film from the March 7 Tokyo performance directed by Stillz, featuring 17 hits and a salsa rendition of "MIA." Spotify announced the release and dropped a teaser on April 6. Additional coverage: a nightclub owner's account of how he introduced Bad Bunny and Drake (leading to their "MIA" collab) circulated April 7–8; and Johns Hopkins University named Bad Bunny as its 2026 Spring Fair headliner on April 9. The timeline was expanded with the Billions Club Live premiere as a new milestone entry.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Wed Apr 8, 2026
summary: Spotify releases "Billions Club Live With Bad Bunny: A Concert Film" globally on April 8, bringing the March 7 Tokyo performance to fans worldwide.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Tue Apr 7, 2026

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Apr 6, 2026
summary: Added two new daily event files covering the late March to early April window. March 31 captures Bad Bunny becoming one of only two artists in history (alongside The Weeknd) to have 30 songs surpass 1 billion Spotify streams each, with "EoO" from *Debí Tirar Más Fotos* as the milestone track. April 4 covers the Sony Pictures bidding war for "The Comebacker" heating up and the Adidas BadBo 1.0 "Rise" confirming a full retail sell-out with resale at $230+. The timeline was expanded with the Spotify 30-songs milestone entry and a new KPI tracking songs with 1B+ streams (30) was added. Meta daycount and heroHeadline updated.
